text:
— 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the revenue center unit count associated with accommodation 
revenue center codes 010X, 012X, 013X, 016X–019X from all claim records included in the stay. Revenue 
center code 0161 (hospital at home, room, and board), effective for claims received on or after July 1, 
2022, is excluded. 

Exception for SNF RUGs demonstration eff. 3/96 SNF update: field is derived from revenue center codes 
in the 9019–9032 series.
